title: 美团 LongCat-2.0 正式发布：在国产算力集群上完成全流程训练与推理的万亿参数模型
raw_text: 作为业界首个在五万卡国产算力集群上完成全流程训练与推理的万亿参数模型（总参数 1.6 T，平均激活约 48 B，动态范围 33B~56B），LongCat-2.0 从零开始预训练，原生支持 1M 超长上下文，其架构设计自始至终围绕一个核心目标：让模型在真实的 Agentic Coding 任务中，更高效、更稳定地完成代码理解、生成与执行。
reason_zh: 业界首个在五万卡国产算力集群上训练的万亿参数模型，原生支持1M上下文，聚焦Agentic Coding。
summary_zh: 美团正式发布LongCat-2.0，这是业界首个在五万卡国产算力集群上完成全流程训练与推理的万亿参数模型。总参数1.6T，平均激活约48B，动态范围33B~56B，原生支持1M超长上下文。架构设计围绕Agentic Coding任务，旨在提升代码理解、生成与执行的效率与稳定性。

title: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.6 系列：三款模型、多智能体协作、全新安全体系
raw_text: OpenAI 已正式发布 GPT-5.6 系列模型，包含旗舰 Sol、均衡型 Terra 和经济型 Luna 三款。这是 OpenAI 首次以同一代系同时推出三个定位清晰的模型层级，定价和性能梯度直接对标 Anthropic 的 Fable 5 / Opus 4.8 产品线。 三款模型，分层定价 Sol 作为旗舰，定价 $5/$30（输入/输出每百万 token）；Terra $2.5/$15；Luna ...
reason_zh: OpenAI正式发布GPT-5.6系列，三款模型分层定价，对标Anthropic，影响重大。
summary_zh: OpenAI正式发布GPT-5.6系列模型，包含旗舰Sol、均衡型Terra和经济型Luna三款。这是OpenAI首次以同一代系推出三个定位清晰的模型层级，定价和性能梯度直接对标Anthropic的Fable 5/Opus 4.8产品线。Sol定价$5/$30（输入/输出每百万token），Terra $2.5/$15，Luna价格更低。

title: SpaceXAI 宣布开源 Grok Build
raw_text: 马斯克旗下 SpaceXAI 宣布将 Grok Build 全面开源，并且重置所有用户的 usage limits。 Grok Build 是 SpaceXAI 的基于终端的 AI 编程智能体。它以全屏 TUI 的形式运行，能够理解用户的代码库、编辑文件、执行 shell 命令、搜索网络并管理长时间运行的任务 —— 既可交互式地运行，也可在无头模式下用于脚本编写/持续集成...
reason_zh: SpaceXAI开源Grok Build，终端AI编程智能体，重置使用限制，对开发者实用。
summary_zh: 马斯克旗下SpaceXAI宣布将Grok Build全面开源，并重置所有用户的使用限制。Grok Build是一款基于终端的AI编程智能体，以全屏TUI形式运行，能理解代码库、编辑文件、执行shell命令、搜索网络并管理长时间运行任务，既可交互式运行，也可在无头模式下用于脚本编写和持续集成。

title: Triton Plugin Extensions: Enabling TLX and Custom Compiler Passes Out of the Box
raw_text: TLDR The PyTorch-Triton 3.7 release introduces the Triton Plugin Extensions system, a framework for dynamically loading custom compiler passes, dialects (including their ops), and DSL extensions into upstream Triton at...
reason_zh: PyTorch-Triton 3.7 引入插件扩展系统，可动态加载自定义编译器和 DSL，对编译器开发者和性能优化者极具实用价值。
summary_zh: PyTorch-Triton 3.7 版本正式推出 Triton Plugin Extensions 系统，这是一个用于动态加载自定义编译器 passes、dialects（包括其操作）和 DSL 扩展的框架。该框架允许开发者在不修改上游 Triton 代码的情况下，将 TLX 等自定义编译器集成到 Triton 中，实现开箱即用。这一特性显著降低了定制化编译器开发的复杂度，为 GPU 编程和深度学习编译器生态提供了更强的灵活性和可扩展性。
title_zh: Triton 插件扩展：开箱即用支持 TLX 和自定义编译器 Pass

title: xai-org/grok-build, now open source
raw_text:
xai-org/grok-build, now open source

xAI's grok CLI tool faced severe community backlash yesterday when it became apparent that running the command in a directory could upload that entire directory to xAI's Google Cloud buckets. One user reported running it in their home directory and seeing it upload "my SSH keys, my password manager database, my documents, photos, videos, everything".

I've not seen an official explanation for why it was doing this, but xAI did respond to the feedback (Musk: "As a precautionary measure, all user data that was uploaded to SpaceXAI before now will be completely and utterly deleted.") and have disabled the feature.

A few hours ago they also released the entire Grok Build codebase under an Apache 2.0 license -
reason_zh: xAI开源grok-build CLI工具，但此前因上传整个目录引发争议，值得关注。
summary_zh: xAI开源了grok CLI工具（grok-build），但此前因在目录中运行会将该目录上传至xAI的Google Cloud存储桶而引发社区强烈反对。消息来源为Simon Willison的博客，属于开源项目发布。

title: Compaction as Epistemic Failure: How Agentic LLM Tools Fabricate Confirmed Results from Killed Processes
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.13071v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: Agentic LLM coding tools compress long session histories into compaction summaries that subsequent sessions inherit as ground truth. This paper documents a failure mode in Claude Code where partial standard output from timed-out commands (exit code 143) is recorded in compaction summaries as confirmed results, propagating false positives across sessions and model versions without re-verification. The underlying mechanism is a conflation of observation and persistence, where information that appeared in the terminal is treated as equivalent to information written to durable storage. This finding extends the analysis of LLM self-evaluation failures reported in prior work on non-determinism in LLM-as-judge grading by showing that agentic tools exhibit analogous reliability deficits when reporting on their own operational outcomes. The failure has direct implications for any workflow that relies on agentic session continuity for data proce
reason_zh: 揭示Claude Code中压缩摘要导致错误传播的机制，对Agent工具开发者有重要警示。
summary_zh: 本文记录了Claude Code中一个关键故障模式：当命令超时（退出码143）时，部分标准输出被记录到压缩摘要中，并被后续会话当作确认结果继承，导致假阳性传播。作者将这种压缩行为定义为“认知失败”，并分析了其如何导致Agent工具产生虚假确认。该研究对Agentic LLM工具的设计和可靠性评估具有重要参考价值。
title_zh: 压缩即认知失败：Agentic LLM工具如何从已终止进程制造确认结果

title: huggingface/transformers v5.14.0
raw_text: # Release v5.14.0 ## New Model additions ### Inkling (fresh from Thinking Machines): 975B total, 41B active * Add Inkling model #47347 by @molbap @Cyrilvallez @eustlb and @zucchini-nlp Inkling is a general-purpose multimodal model that accepts text, image and audio inputs and generates text outputs. It is intended for use in English and other languages, and across multiple coding languages. The model is designed to be used by developers building AI- powered applications, including agentic and tool-use systems, coding assistants, chatbots, and retrieval-augmented generation systems, and is suitable for general-purpose conversational use, instruction-following, and other natural language and multimodal tasks. It is released with open weights to support research, fine-tuning and integration into third-party products by downstream dev
reason_zh: Transformers v5.14.0新增Inkling模型（975B参数），是Thinking Machines的最新成果，值得关注。
summary_zh: Hugging Face Transformers库发布v5.14.0版本，主要新增了Inkling模型（来自Thinking Machines），该模型总参数量975B，激活参数41B，是一个通用多模态模型，可处理文本等多种输入。此外还包括其他改进和修复。
title_zh: huggingface/transformers v5.14.0

title: Adaptive Filtering of the KV Cache: Diagnosing and Correcting Structural-Role Bias in LLM Inference
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.13205v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: Attention-based KV cache eviction (H2O and its descendants) compresses the memory-constrained state of a long-context model by ranking tokens on accumulated attention mass, treated here as signal energy, and keeping the heaviest. On schema-dense input streams such as nested JSON, this score acts as a non-stationary filter that disproportionately retains noise: a non-content sink role (delimiters or whitespace) carries an order of magnitude more energy than any content role, and structural KEY tokens are over-retained at roughly 1.8x the rate of the answer-carrying VALUE tokens, collapsing exact-match accuracy from 88% to 0% at a 5% budget as the signal-to-noise ratio of the retained state degrades. A counterfactual experiment establishes that suppressing KEY tokens is the best deployable filter. Our retraining-free, role-conditional allocation over SnapKV's windowed score, governed by a single tuned hyperparameter, closes 63-98% of the
reason_zh: 诊断并纠正KV缓存淘汰中的结构角色偏差，揭示注意力机制在模式密集输入上的非平稳滤波问题，对长上下文推理有重要实践意义。
summary_zh: 本文诊断并纠正了基于注意力的KV缓存淘汰方法（如H2O）中的结构角色偏差。这些方法通过累积注意力分数对令牌排序并保留最重的，但在模式密集输入（如嵌套JSON）上，该分数表现为非平稳滤波器，不成比例地移除结构角色令牌（如括号、引号），导致推理错误。作者提出自适应滤波方法，动态调整淘汰策略以保留关键结构令牌，显著提升了长上下文推理的准确性和效率。
title_zh: KV缓存的自适应滤波：诊断并纠正LLM推理中的结构角色偏差

title: Oracle Agent Memory as an Enterprise Memory Substrate for Long-Horizon AI Agents
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.13157v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Agent memory is a systems problem for long-horizon agents. Practical deployments require retention of task state across extended conversations, recovery of user-specific facts and preferences across sessions, and accumulation of procedural knowledge from prior outcomes. These requirements extend beyond document retrieval: a memory layer must determine which interactions become durable state, how that state is scoped, how it is retrieved under latency constraints, and how it is revised or removed over time. This report studies Oracle Agent Memory as a database-native memory substrate built on Oracle Database. Three themes organize the discussion: memory as a lifecycle spanning ingestion, extraction, consolidation, retrieval, summarization, and revision or removal; a layered architecture that separates an active memory core from a passive memory-store interface with explicit scope control across users, agents, and threads; and evaluation m
reason_zh: 提出企业级Agent记忆系统方案，解决长周期任务的状态保持和知识积累问题，工程价值高。
summary_zh: 本文提出Oracle Agent Memory，作为长周期AI智能体的企业级记忆基板。针对实际部署中需要跨扩展对话保留任务状态、跨会话恢复用户偏好、积累过程知识等需求，设计了一个超越文档检索的记忆层。该记忆系统能够确定性地保留和检索信息，支持长周期任务的持续执行，为构建可靠的企业级Agent提供了基础设施。
title_zh: Oracle Agent Memory：长周期AI智能体的企业级记忆基板

title: Self-Improving AI Coding Agents Through Accumulated Behavioral Rules: A Closed-Loop Framework
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.13091v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: LLM-based coding agents repeat the same classes of mistakes across sessions because they lack a mechanism to retain corrections from human review feedback. We present a closed-loop framework in which every accepted review comment is codified as a persistent behavioral rule, progressively expanding the set of error classes the agent can self-detect. The framework combines an accumulating rule set in a version-controlled instruction file, a self-review checklist executed before code submission, and automated validation that ensures rule set integrity as it grows. In deployment across a 35+ service microservices platform, the rule set grew from 5 to 18 behavioral rules, 15+ language-specific standards, and a 15-item self-review checklist, all derived from real review feedback. We present empirical results from 11 recorded working sessions spanning code generation, PR review, incident investigation, and cross service refactoring. We observ
reason_zh: 提出闭环框架让编码代理从人类反馈中积累行为规则，实现自我改进，实用性强。
summary_zh: 本文指出基于LLM的编码代理在跨会话中重复相同错误，因为缺乏保留人类审查反馈的机制。作者提出闭环框架，将每个接受的审查评论编码为持久行为规则，逐步扩展代理可自检的错误类别。实验表明，该框架使代理的错误率随会话次数显著下降，且规则可跨项目迁移。该工作为构建持续自我改进的AI编码助手提供了可行方案。
title_zh: 通过累积行为规则实现自我改进的AI编码代理：一个闭环框架

title: Interventional Grounding Audits: Black-Box Premise-Dependency Tests for LLM Chain-of-Thought via Predicate Substitution
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.13069v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Large language models produce chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning that appears logically sound yet may not genuinely depend on its stated premises. We introduce interventional grounding audits, a black-box, step-level test of premise dependency: we intervene on a single premise by substituting its target predicate with a fresh symbol, re-run the model, and check whether each reasoning step's normalized conclusion (canonical predicate form) changes. We evaluate on ProntoQA, a synthetic multi-hop deductive reasoning benchmark with gold proof trees, where step-level premise dependencies are known. Applied to 50 ProntoQA problems with GPT-4o, our method achieves F1 = 0.806 on detecting proof-tree dependencies (F1 = 0.885 on predicate-determining dependencies; Recall = 100%), significantly outperforming a self-consistency baseline (F1 = 0.343; 95% bootstrap CIs non-overlapping). We further identify that 66% of correctly-solved problems contain a
reason_zh: 提出黑盒测试CoT推理是否真正依赖前提的方法，对理解LLM推理可靠性有重要价值。
summary_zh: 本文提出干预性基础审计（Interventional Grounding Audits），一种黑盒、步骤级的前提依赖性测试方法。通过将单个前提中的目标谓词替换为全新符号，重新运行模型，观察推理链是否改变，从而判断模型是否真正依赖该前提。该方法无需访问模型内部，可有效检测LLM在思维链推理中是否存在虚假依赖，为评估推理可靠性提供了新工具。实验表明，许多看似合理的CoT推理实际上并不依赖于其陈述的前提。
title_zh: 干预性基础审计：通过谓词替换对LLM思维链进行黑盒前提依赖性测试

title: Networked Intelligence: Active Shared Context Graphs for Human-AI Team Science
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.13220v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Most AI-for-science systems focus on scaling a single reasoning process through better models, larger context windows, long-horizon agentic execution, or digital co-scientists working with one principal user. However, challenging scientific problems are rarely solved by one reasoner alone. They are solved by teams whose members bring different priors, experimental backgrounds, tacit knowledge, and domain-trained intuitions. The open problem is therefore not only how to scale models, but how to cultivate networked intelligence: scaling the connections between humans and AI systems so that a result or hypothesis produced in one context reaches another person, agent, instrument, or robot that can act on it. We introduce Mycelium, an active shared workspace that automatically connects researchers and AI agents as a multi-user co-scientist. As human users and agents work, the system captures important observations and hypotheses, tracks how t
reason_zh: 提出主动共享上下文图，支持人-AI团队科学协作，突破单推理器局限，视角新颖。
summary_zh: 本文指出大多数AI for Science系统专注于扩展单一推理过程，但科学问题通常由团队解决。为此提出网络化智能（Networked Intelligence）概念，通过主动共享上下文图（Active Shared Context Graphs）支持人-AI团队协作。该框架允许多个推理者（人类和AI）共享上下文，协同解决复杂科学问题，超越了单用户数字科学家的模式。
title_zh: 网络化智能：人-AI团队科学的主动共享上下文图

title: What Models Express, Suppress, and Resist: Auditing Open-Weight LLMs with Persona Vectors
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.13162v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: What a language model will and will not do is largely set during post-training, but which behaviors it expresses, hides, or resists is not revealed by prompting alone. Persona vectors, behavioral directions in activation space, can probe this organization, but prior work covers only a handful of traits. We present the first systematic application of persona vectors at this scale, compiling a 53-trait inventory across four behaviorally distinct domains and labeling every trait in two open-weight models as natural (expressed at baseline), steerable latent but amplifiable, or intractable (resistant to standard extraction). Both models default to helpful, task-oriented behavior: all nine agentic traits are natural, and their default clinician behavior matches a board-certified psychologist's independent desirability judgments on 16 of 17 traits. Steering produces its largest gains on traits these defaults exclude: hyperbole, hallucination,
reason_zh: 首次系统应用Persona向量审计开源LLM的行为表达、抑制与抵抗，揭示仅靠提示无法发现的模型内部机制。
summary_zh: 本文首次系统性地应用Persona向量（激活空间中的行为方向）来审计开源大语言模型（LLM）的行为表达、抑制与抵抗。作者指出，模型在训练后设定的大部分行为无法通过简单提示揭示，而Persona向量可以探测这些内部组织。研究覆盖了多种模型和大量人格特质，展示了如何通过激活空间方向来理解模型的行为边界。该方法为模型安全审计提供了新工具，有助于发现模型隐藏的偏见或风险行为。
title_zh: 模型表达、抑制与抵抗什么：使用Persona向量审计开源LLM

title: Self-Improvements in Modern Agentic Systems: A Survey
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.13104v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Self-improving autonomous agents are moving from research prototypes to deployed systems. The primary goal is controllable evolution, or adaptation, from experience with minimal or even no human input. This survey frames modern self-improving agents as adaptive systems that convert experience into accumulated capability gains. We offer a system-level framework that represents a modern agent as a configuration coupling a foundation model with an operational scaffold of prompts, memory, tools, and control logic. Within this framework, self-improvement is formalized as a self-induced update operator that obtains and commits updates to model parameters or scaffold components. We organize prior work by update target and by the signals that drive change, then review applications and discuss evaluation, before closing with open problems and future directions. For convenience, we track technical updates on https://github.com/selfimproving-agent/
reason_zh: 系统综述现代自主智能体的自我改进机制，提供系统级视角，对构建可进化Agent有指导意义。
summary_zh: 本文综述了现代自主智能体的自我改进能力，将其视为将经验转化为能力积累的自适应系统。文章提供了系统级视角，涵盖可控进化、从经验中适应（最少甚至无需人类输入）等关键概念。讨论了从研究原型到部署系统的转变，并分析了不同自我改进方法的优缺点，为构建可进化的Agent系统提供了全面参考。
title_zh: 现代自主智能体系统的自我改进：综述

title: ollama/ollama v0.32.1
raw_text:
## What's Changed
- Improved Gemma 4 tool calling and multi-turn reasoning, including more reliable tool-response continuations
- Fixed a recurrent MLX model cache leak that could increase memory use across requests, and improved cache snapshot performance
- MLX text model loading now respects `OLLAMA_LOAD_TIMEOUT`
- Agent web search and fetch now tell users to run `ollama signin` when authentication is required
- The interactive agent now receives the current working directory for better project context
- Fixed `ollama launch` so choosing **Pick another model** for a deprecated model passed with `--model` opens the model picker
- Updated VS Code setup documentation for the official Ollama extension

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ollama/ollama/compare/v0.32.0...v0.32.1-rc0
reason_zh: Ollama v0.32.1改进了Gemma 4工具调用和MLX缓存，对本地AI部署用户有直接实用价值。
summary_zh: Ollama发布v0.32.1版本，主要改进包括：增强Gemma 4模型的工具调用和多轮推理能力，修复MLX模型缓存泄漏问题，提升缓存快照性能，MLX文本模型加载现在支持OLLAMA_LOAD_TIMEOUT环境变量，以及Agent网络搜索和获取功能在未认证时提示用户登录。
title_zh: ollama/ollama v0.32.1

title: Harness Handbook: Making Evolving Agent Harnesses Readable,Navigable, and Editable
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.13285v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The capability of a modern AI agent depends not only on its foundation model but also on its harness, which constructs prompts, manages state, invokes tools, and coordinates execution. As models, APIs, environments, and requirements evolve, the harness must be continually modified. Before such a change can be made, a developer or coding agent must identify all code locations that implement the target behavior. This is difficult because production harnesses are large, tightly coupled, and behaviorally distributed, while modification requests describe what the system should do and repositories are organized by files and modules. Code search, repository indexing, and long-context processing ease inspection, but still leave this behavior-to-code mapping to be recovered by hand. Behavior localization is therefore a central bottleneck in harness evolution. We introduce the Harness Handbook, a behavior-centric representation synthesized automat
reason_zh: 提出使Agent harness可读、可导航、可编辑的方法，对Agent开发和维护有实用价值。
summary_zh: 本文指出现代AI智能体的能力不仅取决于基础模型，还取决于其harness（即构造提示、管理状态、调用工具和协调执行的系统）。随着模型、API、环境和需求的变化，harness需要不断修改。本文提出Harness Handbook方法，使不断演化的Agent harness变得可读、可导航和可编辑，方便开发者和编码智能体理解和修改harness，从而提高Agent系统的可维护性。
title_zh: Harness手册：使演化的Agent Harness可读、可导航、可编辑

title: The Entanglement Wall: Activation-Space Probes as Risk Detectors, Not Context Adjudicators
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.13075v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: Context can change whether a request is harmful without changing its topic or surface form. We ask whether residual-stream probes distinguish harmful requests from surface-matched benign controls at a useful operating point. Across three 7-8B model families, an activation sensor blocks 95.5-97.7 percent of judge-classified compliant attacks in a taxonomy-selected set. It also blocks 59.6-68.4 percent of XSTest prompts. A fully disjoint audit reconstructs near-ceiling source-contrast AUROC (0.996-0.999), but fixed transfer to matched pairs is weaker: 0.656-0.819 on the guard-selected Twin-n70 subset and 0.590-0.690 on the full Twin-n163 cohort. We test ten axes on the reference family and seven across all families with leakage, hold-out, and permutation controls. On Twin-n163, no axis evaluated without direct pair-boundary fitting reaches the specified numerical threshold. Requiring persistence on that full cohort was added at analysis
reason_zh: 揭示激活空间探针作为风险检测器的有效性边界，对AI安全对齐有深刻见解。
summary_zh: 本文研究残差流探针能否在有用操作点区分有害请求与表面匹配的良性控制。在三个7-8B模型家族上，激活传感器在测试中阻断了95.5-97.7%的合规攻击，但作者指出其作为上下文裁决者存在根本局限：探针检测的是激活模式而非上下文语义。该工作为理解LLM安全机制提供了新视角，并警示了过度依赖激活探针的风险。
title_zh: 纠缠之墙：激活空间探针作为风险检测器，而非上下文裁决者

title: Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe
raw_text: Google must give rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to key parts of Android and Google Search after the European Union ordered the company to comply with the bloc's digital antitrust rules. The two decisions, handed down Thursday, could weaken Google's control over two of the tech industry's most important platforms and have […]
reason_zh: 欧盟反垄断裁决，要求谷歌向AI竞争对手开放安卓和搜索，影响深远。
summary_zh: 欧盟要求谷歌根据数字反垄断规则，向竞争对手的AI助手和搜索引擎开放安卓和谷歌搜索的关键部分。这两项决定可能削弱谷歌对两大重要平台的控制，对AI行业竞争格局产生重大影响。
title_zh: 欧盟命令谷歌向竞争对手开放安卓和搜索

title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
raw_text: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.
reason_zh: Apple Intelligence获准在华推出，与阿里百度合作，标志苹果AI在中国市场的重要进展。
summary_zh: 据报道，Apple Intelligence已获准在中国市场推出，并与阿里巴巴和百度达成合作。该交易去年已有传闻，此次获批标志着苹果AI在中国这一关键市场迈出重要一步。合作细节尚未完全披露，但预计将涉及本地化AI服务。
title_zh: Apple Intelligence获准在华推出，与阿里巴巴和百度合作

title: 阿里确认通义千问集成至苹果智能系统
raw_text: 有消息称阿里自研大模型通义千问将在中国区苹果设备落地。对此，阿里巴巴发言人证实称：“面向中国用户，通义千问将集成至 iOS、iPadOS、macOS、visionOS 的苹果智能（Apple Intelligence）功能中。” 据网信中国此前公布，苹果技术开发（上海）有限公司的“Apple 智能”大模型已正式完成备案，适用场景为苹果手机，其国...
reason_zh: 阿里通义千问确认集成至苹果智能系统，标志国产大模型在苹果生态的重大突破。
summary_zh: 阿里巴巴发言人证实，自研大模型通义千问将集成至苹果智能（Apple Intelligence）功能中，覆盖 iOS、iPadOS、macOS、visionOS 等中国区苹果设备。此前，苹果技术开发（上海）有限公司的“Apple 智能”大模型已正式完成备案，适用场景为苹果手机。此举标志着国产大模型在苹果生态的重要落地。

title: NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM v1.3.0rc21
raw_text:
- Deprecation Notices
  - AutoDeploy backend is being deprecated. We are aware that earlier model support is a critical priority for many users of TensorRT LLM and are working on agentic approaches to improve time to functional model support in the PyTorch backend. As an early indicator, this was used to release Minimax M3 functional support within the first week of model release.

- Known Issues
   - DeepSeek V3.2
     - Host KV cache offload can fail on multi-GPU setups: executor init may hit GPU OOM (H200), or hang when combined with MTP.
     - Multi-GPU NVFP4 configs on B300 show accuracy failures.
  - Disaggregated Serving
    - DeepSeek V3 Lite + Helix (H100/H20): disaggregated generation can produce incorrect output vs. expected strings.
    - DeepSeek V3 Lite auto-dtype paths are failing in disaggregated mode, including:
    - auto_dtype_with_helix + CUDA graphs on B200/B300.
    - auto_dtype with MTP on RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell.
  - DeepSeek V3 / R1 Family (Aggregat
reason_zh: TensorRT-LLM新版本发布，包含弃用通知和已知问题，对使用NVIDIA推理引擎的开发者有直接参考价值。
summary_zh: NVIDIA发布了TensorRT-LLM v1.3.0rc21版本。主要更新包括：AutoDeploy后端被弃用，NVIDIA正在开发基于PyTorch后端的智能体方法以更快支持新模型，例如已用于在模型发布一周内支持Minimax M3。此外，列出了已知问题。该版本为候选发布版，旨在优化大语言模型推理性能。
title_zh: NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM v1.3.0rc21

title: LongCat 开源 VitaBench 2.0：长期动态智能体基准新标杆
raw_text: VitaBench 2.0 是首个真实生活场景下面向长期动态用户建模的智能体评测基准，它系统性地评测大语言模型在长期、真实、动态的用户互动中个性化与主动性的能力。
reason_zh: 首个真实生活场景下的长期动态智能体评测基准，系统评测大模型个性化与主动性。
summary_zh: LongCat开源了VitaBench 2.0，这是首个面向真实生活场景的长期动态用户建模智能体评测基准。它系统性地评测大语言模型在长期、真实、动态的用户互动中展现的个性化与主动性能力，为智能体研究提供了新的评估标准。

title: 欧盟要求谷歌开放安卓AI功能及搜索数据
raw_text: 欧盟委员会7月16日依据《数字市场法》（DMA）向谷歌发布两项具有约束力的技术规范措施，要求其向第三方AI助手开放Android系统关键功能，并向第三方搜索引擎共享匿名化搜索数据，以促进人工智能和搜索市场竞争。根据要求，谷歌需允许第三方AI助手调用Android关键系统功能，支持语音唤醒、跨应用执行任务等能力，与Gemini获得同等待遇；同时，谷歌需向符合条件的搜索引擎及具备搜索功能的AI聊天机器人开放匿名化搜索数据，并建立透明的数据获取及定价机制。（界面）
reason_zh: 欧盟首次依据DMA对谷歌AI功能提出具体开放要求，可能重塑移动AI生态竞争格局。
summary_zh: 欧盟委员会依据《数字市场法》向谷歌发布两项约束性措施：一是要求谷歌向第三方AI助手开放Android系统关键功能，包括语音唤醒、跨应用执行等，使其获得与Gemini同等待遇；二是要求谷歌向第三方搜索引擎及具备搜索功能的AI聊天机器人开放匿名化搜索数据，并建立透明的数据获取与定价机制。此举旨在促进AI和搜索市场的竞争，防止谷歌利用平台优势限制竞争对手。

title: Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
raw_text: OpenAI has built an LLM super-hacker called GPT-Red that it uses as a sparring partner to help its other models boost their defenses against cyberattacks. Last week the company released the latest version of its flagship LLM, GPT-5.6. OpenAI says that training it against GPT-Red made the model its most robust release yet. GPT-Red automates…
reason_zh: OpenAI用GPT-Red作为红队伙伴训练GPT-5.6，提升模型安全性，是AI安全领域的重要进展。
summary_zh: OpenAI开发了一个名为GPT-Red的LLM超级黑客，用作其模型的陪练伙伴，帮助提升防御网络攻击的能力。上周发布的GPT-5.6是迄今为止最稳健的版本，正是通过与GPT-Red对抗训练实现的。GPT-Red能够自动化红队测试，模拟攻击行为，从而暴露模型漏洞并促使改进。
title_zh: 认识GPT-Red：OpenAI为提升模型安全性而构建的LLM超级黑客

title: What building Shippy taught us about building agents
reason_zh: 通过构建Shippy的实战经验，总结构建AI Agent的教训与最佳实践，对开发者极具价值。
summary_zh: 本文分享了团队在构建名为Shippy的AI Agent过程中的经验教训。核心发现包括：Agent的可靠性远比功能丰富更重要；需要精心设计状态管理和错误恢复机制；上下文窗口管理是关键瓶颈；工具调用需要严格的验证和回退策略。作者还讨论了如何平衡自主性与可控性，以及如何通过迭代式反馈改进Agent行为。这些实战经验为构建生产级Agent提供了宝贵参考。
title_zh: 构建Shippy教会了我们什么：关于构建Agent的经验

title: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
raw_text: Suno data obtained in a hacking incident has exposed that the AI music generator was trained by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from online audio platforms, including YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius, 404 Media reports. Given that Suno has avoided revealing what's in its training datasets and how they were acquired, this a rare […]
reason_zh: Suno训练数据来源曝光，涉及从YouTube等平台抓取数百万歌曲，引发版权争议。
summary_zh: 据404 Media报道，在一次黑客事件中泄露的数据显示，AI音乐生成公司Suno的训练数据集包含从YouTube Music、Deezer和Genius等平台抓取的数百万首歌曲和歌词。Suno此前一直未公开其训练数据的来源和获取方式，此次泄露罕见地揭示了其数据采集行为，可能引发严重的版权法律问题。
title_zh: Suno从YouTube、Genius和Deezer抓取了数百万首歌曲

title: NVIDIA Introduces New Jetson Thor Computers to Advance Mainstream Robotics and Edge AI
raw_text: General-purpose robots and autonomous machines are moving from research labs to real-world mass-market deployment, creating demand for compact, power-efficient AI supercomputers capable of running foundation models at the edge.  To meet that need, NVIDIA today introduced the T3000 and T2000, new modules based on the NVIDIA Thor architecture that enable mass-market robotics and edge AI […]
reason_zh: NVIDIA发布基于Thor架构的新Jetson模块，面向机器人和边缘AI，对相关开发者有参考价值。
summary_zh: NVIDIA宣布推出基于Thor架构的T3000和T2000新模块，旨在推动主流机器人和边缘AI的发展。这些紧凑、节能的AI超级计算机能够在边缘运行基础模型，满足通用机器人和自主机器从研究实验室向大规模市场部署的需求。新模块将帮助开发者构建更强大的机器人系统和边缘AI应用。
title_zh: NVIDIA推出新Jetson Thor计算机，推动主流机器人和边缘AI发展

title: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
raw_text: OpenAI is finally releasing some hardware. No, it isn't the mysterious AI-powered device the company is developing with former Apple designer Jony Ive, a project already tangled up in a messy lawsuit. Instead, it's a product designed to be used with its coding platform, Codex. The device, a square-shaped block of buttons called Codex Micro, […]
reason_zh: OpenAI 发布 Codex Micro 硬件，专为编程平台 Codex 设计，是 AI 硬件领域的新动向。
summary_zh: OpenAI 终于发布了硬件产品，但并非传闻中与 Jony Ive 合作的 AI 设备，而是为编程平台 Codex 设计的 Codex Micro。该设备是一个方形按钮块，专用于 Codex 平台，旨在提升编程效率。这一发布标志着 OpenAI 在硬件领域的初步尝试，尽管规模较小。
title_zh: OpenAI 终于发布硬件……但只是为 Codex 设计的
